description_long: This community center consists of a rectangular, single-story building with a flat roof, surrounded by a paved driveway and enclosed by a perimeter fence. The main structure features a combination of concrete and metal, with a large section of the roof covered in colorful graffiti art. Adjacent to the main building is a smaller annex with a sloped, light-colored roof, likely serving as an auxiliary space or storage. The grounds include sparse landscaping with a few trees and grassy patches, as well as several streetlights lining the perimeter. The entire property is bordered by a low fence, and there is a dedicated entrance driveway connecting to the main road. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A rectangular, flat-roofed community center with graffiti art on the roof, surrounded by a paved driveway, fencing, and sparse landscaping. The structure is utilitarian, with an annex and several streetlights around the property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance driveway, graffiti-covered roof, and fenced perimeter with adjacent annex building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building, annex with sloped roof, and the fenced boundary along the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, more greenery, and the continuation of the perimeter fence.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the paved driveway, streetlights, and the overall layout of the community center within its fenced lot.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is visible from the front, consisting of a wide driveway leading to a gate in the perimeter fence. The entrance appears to be accessible by vehicles and pedestrians, but no specific accessibility features or decorative elements are visible. The entrance integrates functionally with the utilitarian design of the structure.
attribute_architectural_style: The architectural style is utilitarian and functional, with a flat roof, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on practicality. The use of concrete, metal, and simple geometric forms suggests a contemporary, industrial-influenced design.
